offer.name: Savings with Standard Chartered at Aarawild Kandalama!
offer.otitle: Enjoy savings of 40% at Aarawild Kandalama with Standard Chartered credit cards
offer.odesc:
Enjoy savings of 40% on the room rates at the "Wild Glamping" villa at Aarawild Kandalama, with Standard Chartered credit cards. This offer is valid until 30 June 2026, for stays until 31 July 2026.

Send an email to sales@aarawild.com, info@aarawild.com or reservations@aarawild.com, or call 0766542272 or 0777442272 for reservations.

*T&C Apply.
offer.tnc:
Terms and Conditions

• This offer is valid only for holders of Standard Chartered credit cards issued in Sri Lanka.
• This offer is valid for bookings made from 26 May to 30 June 2026, for stays from 26 May to 31 July 2026.
• The full payment for the reservation needs to be paid using the Standard Chartered credit card, to avail this offer.
• The cardholder must be present throughout the stay.
• A prior reservation must be made and confirmation is based on availability.
• This offer cannot be used in conjunction with other offers/promotions available at Aarawild Kandalama.
• Standard Chartered will not accept any liability in respect of the goods and services provided by the merchant and for any non-adherence to health & safety guidelines by the merchant.
• Standard Chartered reserves the right to amend/withdraw this offer at its sole discretion with prior notice.
• Neither Standard Chartered nor the merchant accepts any liability for the consequences arising out of interruption / disruption of its business or services by or on account of but not limited to acts of God, pandemics, riots, civil commotion, insurrections, wars, strikes or lockouts or for any reason beyond their control.

• Other general credit card terms & conditions will continue to apply.

offer.name: Savings with Crazy Jets!
offer.otitle: Enjoy savings of up to 15% , along with 0% Instalment Payment Plans up to 24 months at Crazy Jets
offer.odesc: Enjoy savings of 15% with Crazy Jets, along with 0% Instalment Payment Plans up to 24 months, with Standard Chartered credit cards. Visit www.crazyjets.com to make your bookings. This offer is valid until 30 June 2026 *T&C Apply.
offer.tnc:
Terms and Conditions
• The offer is valid only for holders of Standard Chartered credit cards issued in Sri Lanka.
• This offer is valid until 30 June 2026.
• The cardholder will receive a saving of up to 15% on the flight fare component for online bookings placed via www.crazyjets.com.
• 0% Instalment Payment Plans up to 24 months are applicable for transactions of LKR50,000 and above (call 0112480480 to convert).
• This offer is only available for flights departing from Bandaranayke Airport (CMB).
• The promotional bookings purchased cannot be resold.
• The promotional fares are not applicable for infants.
• The bookings need to be made and confirmed at least 3 days prior to departure.
• This offer cannot be used in conjunction with any other promotion.
• The prices are subject to availability and may vary without prior notice.
• The prices are not guaranteed until payment has been made in full, tickets have been issued and received by the customer.
• Bookings are non-refundable unless otherwise specified.
• No online booking fees.
• This offer is not applicable for offline bookings, low-cost airline carriers and everyday low category.
• Any amendments or cancellations made following the issuance of a ticket may incur cancellation charges, penalties and a fare difference if applicable.
• Visa, meals, baggage, seat allocation and bassinets are not included unless otherwise specified.
• All travellers must have valid visas including transit visa; passports or re-entry permits as per the regulations of the immigration and other government authorities. Unless otherwise stated by the traveller at the time of booking, it will be assumed that the traveller meets all requirements as stated above. Therefore, any penalties, fines or expenditures incurred as a result of such documents not meeting the requirements of those authorities will be the traveler’s sole responsibility.
• Expenses/losses incurred after the issuance of tickets as a result of flight changes, cancellations, delays, luggage losses, natural disasters, supplier/airlines insolvency etc. is not covered by Crazy Jets. The passenger is responsible for obtaining travel insurance to cover such circumstances.
• Standard Chartered will not accept any liability in respect of the goods and services provided by the merchant and for any non-adherence to health & safety guidelines by the merchant.
• Standard Chartered reserves the right to amend/withdraw this offer at its sole discretion with prior notice.
• Neither Standard Chartered nor the merchant accepts any liability for the consequences arising out of interruption / disruption of its business or services by or on account of but not limited to acts of God, pandemics, riots, civil commotion, insurrections, wars, strikes or lockouts or for any reason beyond their control.
• If any dispute arises, the decision of Standard Chartered and Crazy Jets will be considered as final.
• Other general credit card Terms & Conditions will continue to apply.
• You confirm that you have read the full list of terms of conditions available at crazyjets.com, the conditions of carriage of the ticket-issuing airline and agree to comply with Crazy Jets booking conditions.

venue.name: Crazy Jets
venue.add: 75 Dr NM Perera Mawatha Road, Colombo 08, Sri Lanka
